user_intent: Solo female runner at night in downtown Dallas. Hard rim lighting like Oakley campaign. She is mid-run, sweating, powerful. Dallas skyline visible behind her. Neon lime green light accents. Athletic ad campaign photography.

subject.description: Black woman, late 20s, athletic build, deep dark brown skin covered in a visible layer of sweat, beads of sweat running down her temples and neck, expression of fierce determination and focus, mid-stride with one foot off the ground, defined arm muscles catching hard light, box braids pulled back into a high ponytail swinging with motion
clothing: fitted black long-sleeve crop top with mesh ventilation panels
neon lime green high-waisted running shorts
black Nike ZoomX running shoes with lime green swoosh
accessories: reflective running vest with thin orange piping
Garmin watch on left wrist glowing green

scene.location: Downtown Dallas Texas street at night, Reunion Tower and Dallas skyline silhouetted in the background, urban concrete sidewalk with a commercial district feel, glass building facades reflecting neon, streetlights casting hard pools of light on the sidewalk
scene.weather: warm and humid, slight atmospheric haze from summer heat, no rain

lighting.direction: hard rim light from directly behind creating a bright edge outline around her entire silhouette, secondary lime green neon fill from a storefront sign camera left, faint orange accent light from a crosswalk signal camera right

materials.primary: concrete sidewalk with painted lane markings
materials.texture: smooth sweaty skin contrasting with rough urban concrete

composition.framing: dutch angle tilted 15 degrees, runner filling the left side of frame, city lights streaking diagonally across the background
composition.angle: worm's eye view, camera on the ground shooting straight up at her as she runs over the camera, dramatic foreshortening of her legs, her face powerful above
composition.focus_subject: her leading foot and lower leg razor sharp in foreground with her determined face sharp above, extreme depth and drama

quality.sharpness: razor-sharp on subject, creamy bokeh background
quality.post_processing: cinematic color grading, deep crushed blacks, neon lime green and orange accent tones, slight film grain, high contrast with retained shadow detail, Oakley campaign grade processing

negative_prompt: blurry, low quality, watermark, text overlay, distorted hands, extra fingers, cartoon, illustration, soft flat lighting, overexposed, stock photo, posed, stiff, smiling, casual, gym interior, treadmill
